title: blepharanthemum sidoides
intro: Blepharanthemum sidoides, also known as the 'Eyebright', is a perennial herb native to South America, characterized by its small white or pink flowers and hairy leaves. The Eyebright has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating eye infections and inflammation due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. Its health benefits include reducing eye fatigue, improving vision, and alleviating symptoms of conjunctivitis and blepharitis. Blepharanthemum sidoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various eye and respiratory issues.
